name: Moroccan Style Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large, heavy pot.
2. Add the onions and garlic. Sauté until the onions are translucent.
3. Mix in the ginger, coriander, and parsley. Add salt and pepper to taste. Cook for about 3 minutes.
4. Wash and dry the chicken pieces.
5. Add the chicken to the spice mixture. Fry a few pieces at a time until golden brown on all sides.
6. If needed, add more oil to the pot.
7. Add the chicken broth and water. Cover and cook slowly for 40 minutes.
8. Mix in the lemon quarters and olives. Continue cooking for an additional 20 minutes, or until all ingredients are tender.
